faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Rahway?
faqs.answer: Rahway residents most commonly encounter house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. House crickets are attracted to warmth and often enter homes during cooler months, while field crickets prefer outdoor areas but may invade basements and crawl spaces. Camel crickets are frequently found in damp areas like basements and are common in older Rahway homes.
